title: citrus medica subf. aurea
intro: Citrus medica subf. aurea, also known as the bitter orange, is a variety of citrus fruit that belongs to the Rutaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea. The health benefits of Citrus medica subf. aurea include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and aid in weight management. It can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including essential oils, teas, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
